title: PALUDO Set of 3 Storage Baskets, 3 Sizes Wicker Bathroom Basket, Small Natural Paper Rope Changing Basket, Woven Hamper Baskets for Shelves, Cosmetics, Makeup, Toys, Table Organiser
features: Multifunctional storage: The woven baskets have three practical sizes: Small (18cm x12cmx10cm), Medium (22cm x16cmx11cm), Large(26cm x20cm x12cm), for different storage options.

Handmade & Durable: These hamper baskets are handmade by skilled artisans with attention to detail and quality.The baskets are attached with wire and each side is firmly fixed to ensure a long life.The storage baskets come with a removable patterned cloth which makes cleaning very easy.

Natural & Recyclable:Made of recyclable paper, No chemical plastics,Eco-friendly and safe tasteless to provide a safe and skin-friendly storage solution, which is important for our nature and environment.

Multifunctional:These storage boxes can be used for a variety of purposes, such as storage, organising items, decoration, etc. Examples include storing toys, underwear, towels, cosmetics, cotton buds, tampons, baby nappies, CDs and more. Ideal for use in homes, kitchen,bathroom,offices,vehicles, picnics and other environments for convenience and practicality.

Stylish Design:Woven Storage Baskets The simple design and warm colours meet the family's definition of beauty. to suit most modern home decors.This basket also makes a great Christmas gift for friends and family as a home gift
description: PALUDO 3-Piece Storage Baskets – Natural Paper Rope Storage Basket, 3 Size Wicker Hamper Basket with Linings, Boho Storage Baskets for Toys, Bathroom, Living Room & Bedroom (Beige) Features: Stackable Design – 3Pcs storage basket set in Small (18×12×10 cm), Medium (22×16×11 cm), and Large (26×20×12 cm). These woven baskets are stackable, helping save space and keep your home organized. Sustainable & Eco-Friendly – These woven storage baskets are made from natural paper rope with a sturdy metal frame. The removable cotton and linen lining is breathable and easy to clean. Handwoven & Durable - Each basket is meticulously handwoven, ensuring unique craftsmanship and lasting durability. Versatile Use – These wicker baskets are ideal for storing cosmetics, toys, keys, remote controls, books,towels, cotton swabs, tampons, baby diapers, CDs, hygiene products, cleaning supplies, office items, and more. Perfect for use in the bathroom, bedroom, living room, laundry room, or office. Stylish Boho Design – The hamper baskets design with a neutral beige woven pattern complements various home styles. Specifications: Material: Paper + Metal Frame + Cotton Linen Color: Beige Size: Small (18cm × 12cm × 10cm), Medium (22cm × 16cm × 11cm), Large (26cm × 20cm × 12cm) Package Includes: 3-Piece Storage Baskets
